# .github Workspace Notes

This folder contains working documentation and skills used during FragCoord feature transplants and related architecture work.

## Docs

Primary documentation lives under `.github/docs/`.

### Architecture

- `docs/architecture/shadertoy-report.md` - architecture report for the shader-toy extension (entry points, parsing pipeline, webview assembly, render loop, IPC, feature modules).
- `docs/architecture/shadertoyPRs-overview.md` - PR progression overview and architectural decision trail.
- `docs/architecture/shadertoyPanels-overview.md` - panel/webview machinery overview.

### Planning (FragCoord v0.7.1)

- `docs/planning/fragcoord-overview(0.7.1).md` - source architecture overview for FragCoord v0.7.1.
- `docs/planning/fragcoord-transplant-plan(0.7.1).md` - cross-feature transplant strategy.
- `docs/planning/fragcoord(0.7.1)-PLAN#inspect.md` - inspect feature plan.
- `docs/planning/fragcoord(0.7.1)-PLAN#errors.md` - errors feature plan.
- `docs/planning/fragcoord(0.7.1)-PLAN#frames.md` - frames feature plan.
- `docs/planning/fragcoord(0.7.1)-PLAN#heatmap.md` - heatmap feature plan.

## Skills

Project skills live under `.github/skills/`.

- `skills/fragcoord/SKILL.md` - FragCoord-focused implementation and troubleshooting guidance.
- `skills/shader-toy/SKILL.md` - shader-toy extension architecture and workflow guidance.

## Scope

These files are support material for in-repo development workflows and WIP branch work. They are not extension runtime assets.
